name: Glucose | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: Glucose oral powder is indicated for general weakness. It can be taken after excessive work and exertion as it replenishes depleted energy.Glucose tablet is used to treat low blood sugar level (Hypoglycemia), most often in people with Diabetes Mellitus.
description: Glucose is a crystalline, water-soluble monosaccharide, which is absorbed in the blood stream through intestinal wall and is used as a source of energy.
dosage_&amp;_administration: Glucose oral powder: There is no specific dosage regimen. The dosage depends on the requirement of an individual or as recommended by the physician.Glucose tablet: Take 4 tablets at a time by chewing. Wait 15 minutes recheck the blood glucose level. If it is below than normal level (70 mg/dL), then take another 4 tablets. Or as directed by registered physician.
interaction: There are no significant interactions reported with this medicine.
contraindications: Persons having glucose intolerance and hypersensitivity to it.
precautions_&amp;_warnings: This is for oral consumption only. It is not for injection.
storage_conditions: Store in a dry place and away from light. Keep out of reach of children.
